channel.title: Blogs on Projektemacher
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on Projektemacher

item.title: Vorsatzpapier
item.description: Before the age of desktop publishing and Google fonts there where type tables…

item.title: Kinderbücher
item.description: We show our children things that we believe are good (for them) … Only had past generations different values ​​than we do today.

item.title: Vorsatzpapier
item.description: Around 1900 many books were produced with beautiful book end papers. This blog shows some of them… And wallpapers.

item.title: Kleiderbügel
item.description: “Kleiderbügel” (coat hangers) is a sub project of “Blaufußtölpel” and presents different coat hangers.

item.title: Projektemacher
item.description: “Projektemacher” is the Überblog for my different projects.

item.title: Blaufußtölpel
item.description: Fashion is not just an expression of the prevailing aesthetic spirit of time…

item.title: Backsteinexpressionismus
item.description: In the 20ies there was an unusual architectural style that always fascinated me…

item.title: Ric - An unknown artist
item.description: “Ric” worked in the second half of the 20th century and only signed his prints with “Ric”. The blog presents his works and participates in the international search for Ric’s identity.

item.title: Hässliche Plastiktiere und Zeugs
item.description: A questionable trend of the early 21st century are animal parades. This blog shows numerous examples.

item.title: Flohmarktfunde
item.description: Flea markets visits in Göttingen and Bremen.

item.title: Diapraesentation
item.description: About using old slide projectors for presentations.

item.title: Yaapb
item.description: Analog photography is a thing from the past, this blog presents photos taken with analog cameras and presents found films from flea markets.

item.title: Krähenbeißer
item.description: “Krähenbeißer” is a blog that presents historical images of crowbitters.
